steps.title: Find the slope from two points on the line
steps.content:
From the graph, the line of best fit passes through the points (0,84) and (10,414).
Compute the slope $$m = \frac{414-84}{10-0} = \frac{330}{10} = 33$$.
Thus the slope is 33.

steps.title: Determine the y‑intercept and match to answer choices
steps.content:
The y‑intercept is the d‑value when t=0, which from the point (0,84) is 84.
Therefore the line of best fit is $$d = 33t + 84$$.
Comparing with the choices, only choice D matches this equation.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
